'''鈭歞-zh-p''' ('''kadazhap''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:knob|knob]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-zh-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:knob|knob]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歞-zh-p
|-
! Lemma
| kadazhap
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thidazhap|thidazhap]] || [[word:jidazhap|jidazhap]] || [[word:shidazhap|shidazhap]] || [[word:kidazhap|kidazhap]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthudazhap|thuthudazhap]] || [[word:jujudazhap|jujudazhap]] || [[word:shushudazhap|shushudazhap]] || [[word:kukudazhap|kukudazhap]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thudazhap|thudazhap]] || [[word:judazhap|judazhap]] || [[word:shudazhap|shudazhap]] || [[word:kudazhap|kudazhap]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thudazhap|thudazhap]] || [[word:judazhap|judazhap]] || [[word:shudazhap|shudazhap]] || [[word:kudazhap|kudazhap]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thedazhap|thedazhap]] || [[word:jedazhap|jedazhap]] || [[word:shedazhap|shedazhap]] || [[word:kedazhap|kedazhap]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothodazhap|thothodazhap]] || [[word:jojodazhap|jojodazhap]] || [[word:shoshodazhap|shoshodazhap]] || [[word:kokodazhap|kokodazhap]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thodazhap|thodazhap]] || [[word:jodazhap|jodazhap]] || [[word:shodazhap|shodazhap]] || [[word:kodazhap|kodazhap]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thodazhap|thodazhap]] || [[word:jodazhap|jodazhap]] || [[word:shodazhap|shodazhap]] || [[word:kodazhap|kodazhap]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:dazhap|dazhap]] || [[word:dazhap|dazhap]] || [[word:dazhap|dazhap]] || [[word:dazhap|dazhap]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:dazhap|dazhap]] || [[word:dazhap|dazhap]] || [[word:dazhap|dazhap]] || [[word:dazhap|dazhap]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:dazhap|dazhap]] || [[word:dazhap|dazhap]] || [[word:dazhap|dazhap]] || [[word:dazhap|dazhap]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:dazhap|dazhap]] || [[word:dazhap|dazhap]] || [[word:dazhap|dazhap]] || [[word:dazhap|dazhap]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙dazhap|th忙dazhap]] || [[word:j忙dazhap|j忙dazhap]] || [[word:sh忙dazhap|sh忙dazhap]] || [[word:k忙dazhap|k忙dazhap]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathadazhap|thathadazhap]] || [[word:jajadazhap|jajadazhap]] || [[word:shashadazhap|shashadazhap]] || [[word:kakadazhap|kakadazhap]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thadazhap|thadazhap]] || [[word:jadazhap|jadazhap]] || [[word:shadazhap|shadazhap]] || [[word:kadazhap|kadazhap]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thadazhap|thadazhap]] || [[word:jadazhap|jadazhap]] || [[word:shadazhap|shadazhap]] || [[word:kadazhap|kadazhap]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shadazhap|shadazhap]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshadazhap|goshadazhap]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishadazhap|gokishadazhap]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shadazhapn眉|shadazhapn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshadazhapnkn眉|goshadazhapnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishadazhapn眉|gokishadazhapn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shadazhapsh毛|shadazhapsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshadazhapnksh毛|goshadazhapnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishadazhapsh毛|gokishadazhapsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadazhapro|shadazhapro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadazhapnkro|goshadazhapnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadazhapro|gokishadazhapro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shadazhapmu|shadazhapmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadazhapnkmu|goshadazhapnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadazhapmu|gokishadazhapmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shadazhapsher|shadazhapsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshadazhapnksher|goshadazhapnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishadazhapsher|gokishadazhapsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shadazhapng|shadazhapng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshadazhapnkng|goshadazhapnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishadazhapng|gokishadazhapng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shadazhapya|shadazhapya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshadazhapnkya|goshadazhapnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishadazhapya|gokishadazhapya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shadazhapyam|shadazhapyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshadazhapnkyam|goshadazhapnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishadazhapyam|gokishadazhapyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shadazhapn眉sh毛|shadazhapn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshadazhapnkn眉sh毛|goshadazhapnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishadazhapn眉sh毛|gokishadazhapn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadazhapn眉ro|shadazhapn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadazhapnkn眉ro|goshadazhapnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadazhapn眉ro|gokishadazhapn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadazhapn眉mu|shadazhapn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadazhapnkn眉mu|goshadazhapnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadazhapn眉mu|gokishadazhapn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shadazhapsh毛n眉|shadazhapsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshadazhapnksh毛n眉|goshadazhapnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishadazhapsh毛n眉|gokishadazhapsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadazhapsh毛ro|shadazhapsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadazhapnksh毛ro|goshadazhapnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadazhapsh毛ro|gokishadazhapsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadazhapsh毛mu|shadazhapsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadazhapnksh毛mu|goshadazhapnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadazhapsh毛mu|gokishadazhapsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shadazhapron眉|shadazhapron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshadazhapnkron眉|goshadazhapnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishadazhapron眉|gokishadazhapron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shadazhaprosh毛|shadazhaprosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshadazhapnkrosh毛|goshadazhapnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishadazhaprosh毛|gokishadazhaprosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadazhapromu|shadazhapromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadazhapnkromu|goshadazhapnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadazhapromu|gokishadazhapromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shadazhapmun眉|shadazhapmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshadazhapnkmun眉|goshadazhapnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishadazhapmun眉|gokishadazhapmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shadazhapmush毛|shadazhapmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshadazhapnkmush毛|goshadazhapnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishadazhapmush毛|gokishadazhapmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadazhapmuro|shadazhapmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadazhapnkmuro|goshadazhapnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadazhapmuro|gokishadazhapmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c6f8e69}}
